display.purpose: Hero headlines, section headings. Geometric and confident.

body.purpose: Paragraph text, descriptions. Warm and readable.

mono.purpose: Labels, status indicators, data. Technical signal, never body copy.

shadows.name: glow-ambient
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA hover glow. Signals interactivity.

shadows.name: glow-safe
shadows.purpose: Safe verdict glow. Reinforces positive status.

shadows.name: glow-danger
shadows.purpose: Danger verdict glow. Reinforces alert status.

shadows.name: inset-highlight
shadows.purpose: Top-edge highlight on glass cards. Subtle lit-from-above effect.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Elevated surfaces — modals, dropdowns, floating elements.

motion.name: ease-in-out
motion.purpose: Symmetric transitions — scan lines, cycling animations.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The highest-contrast action element. Signal Amber on Cosmic Indigo.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(75% 0.17 75); color: oklch(14% 0.042 278); font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { box-shadow: 0 0 24px oklch(75% 0.17 75 / 25%); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.17 75 / 40%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action. Transparent with muted text, shifts to primary text on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: transparent; color: oklch(76% 0.012 285); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: oklch(92% 0.006 285); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(75% 0.17 75 / 40%); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: URL Input
components.description: Primary URL input field. Dark semi-transparent with amber focus ring.
components.html: <input class="ds-input" type="url" placeholder="Tempel link di sini..." />
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 11px 16px; border-radius: 12px; background: oklch(14% 0.008 250 / 80%); border: 1px solid oklch(28% 0.05 280); color: oklch(92% 0.006 285); font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(75% 0.17 75); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(56% 0.016 285); }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Overlay/floating card with glass effect. Reserved for overlays, not default cards.
components.css: .ds-glass-card { background: oklch(16% 0.008 250 / 70%); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid oklch(28% 0.05 280); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: inset 0 1px 1px oklch(100% 0 0 / 6%), inset 0 0 16px oklch(100% 0 0 / 2%), 0 8px 32px oklch(0% 0 0 / 50%); border-top: 1px solid oklch(100% 0 0 / 10%); }

components.name: Safe Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-safe { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(62% 0.14 185 / 10%); color: oklch(62% 0.14 185); border: 1px solid oklch(62% 0.14 185 / 30%); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Danger Badge
components.css: .ds-badge-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: oklch(58% 0.22 25 / 10%); color: oklch(58% 0.22 25); border: 1px solid oklch(58% 0.22 25 / 30%); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.6rem; letter-spacing: 0.06em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Floating Header
components.description: Glass-effect navigation bar, fixed to top. Compact layout.
components.html:
Urlveil
FiturEdukasiKontak
components.css: .ds-header { position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 12px 24px; background: oklch(14% 0.042 278 / 80%); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(28% 0.05 280); z-index: 50; } .ds-header-logo { font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; color: oklch(92% 0.006 285); } .ds-header-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; } .ds-header-links a { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.85rem; color: oklch(76% 0.012 285); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms; } .ds-header-links a:hover { color: oklch(92% 0.006 285); }

narrative.overview:
Urlveil's design system is built around the metaphor of a precision instrument — a well-calibrated device that delivers clear, trustworthy readings. Every element serves a function; nothing is decorative noise. The interface communicates technical credibility through clean geometry, purposeful motion, and a restrained but distinctive color palette.

The system rejects the cold corporate aesthetic of enterprise security tools and the templated warmth of generic SaaS landing pages. Instead, it occupies a distinct space: technically precise but approachable, dark but not cold, serious but not intimidating.
keyCharacteristics: Functional precision — every visual choice maps to a purpose
Warm darkness — deep blue-violet base with amber warmth
Economy of means — three font weights, four surface levels, three semantic colors
Status-driven color — amber = action, teal = safe, coral = danger

rules.name: The Status Trinity Rule
rules.body: Color communicates status, never decoration. Amber = attention/action, Teal = safe/positive, Coral = danger/alert.

rules.name: The Tinted Neutral Rule
rules.body: All neutrals carry 0.04–0.06 chroma toward hue 278–280. No pure grays.

rules.name: The Line-Length Rule
rules.body: Body text never exceeds 75ch. Content is constrained by max-width, not font size.

rules.name: The Mono Restraint Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is reserved for data, code, labels, and status indicators. Never for body copy or headings.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows and glows appear only as responses to state or to communicate status.

rules.name: The No-Drop-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No ambient drop shadows on cards or containers. Tonal layering provides depth.

dos: Use the Status Trinity (Amber/Teal/Coral) for all semantic color
Maintain the tinted neutral ramp — all grays carry chroma toward hue 278–280
Keep body text at ≥4.5:1 contrast against its background
Provide prefers-reduced-motion alternatives for all animations
Use the glass effect sparingly — only for overlays and floating elements
donts: Use glassmorphism as default card treatment
Pair border + wide box-shadow on the same element
Use border-radius: 32px+ on cards or sections
Repeat tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section
Use the enterprise security aesthetic (Norton, Kaspersky)
Use the generic SaaS landing page aesthetic (cream bg, gradient text, card grids)
Use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as default scaffolding
